summary: Full E2E testing of Zenith app. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases pass (root, tasks CRUD, jar capacity overflow, ship task + session/fuel updates, session, save-day replay, replays list). Frontend: Playwright E2E validated app boot, HUD elements, task add/ship/delete, type selector (pebble/stone/sand), volume meter updates (15 -> 45), view toggles (jar/split/arena), replay modal with save-replay-btn and download-poster-btn and success toast. All critical data-testids present and functional.

issues: Poster preview canvas renders against a #0A0A0A bg inside a very dark modal making it visually hard to see the boundary of the poster on the preview; consider a subtle border or lighter scaffolding around canvas for clarity. Functionally works (save toast appears, download-poster-btn clickable).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/session/save-day works even when there is no session yet (session can be None). Consider calling get_or_create_session() first so the replay always has a session payload.
server.py: No validation on TaskCreate.task_type - unknown types silently fall back to pebble volume (15) but task_type string is saved as-is. Add Enum/Literal validation to reject invalid types.

server.py: /api/tasks/{id}/ship ignores jar capacity check for shipped volume; OK by design, but fuel_remaining can go negative if session starts fresh after tasks existed; not observed but worth guarding with $max.
server.py: CORS uses allow_credentials=True with allow_origins=['*'] which is insecure/invalid per spec; restrict origins in production.
No DELETE endpoint for shipped tasks/session cleanup; fine for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup TEST_-prefixed tasks automatically; save-day inserts a replay row (no cleanup, but OK - replays are historical).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest). Reuse as regression. BASE_URL taken from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Jar capacity test fills the jar with 3 stones then asserts 400 on next stone/pebble, so run tests at a quiet time or they may briefly saturate today's jar between requests. Frontend testids verified: zenith-app, hud-bar, hud-brand, shipped-count, timer-display, fuel-meter, score-display, view-toggle-(planner|split|arena), save-day-btn, task-panel, task-input, add-task-btn, task-type-trigger, type-(stone|pebble|sand), ship-btn-{id}, delete-btn-{id}, volume-meter, jar-canvas, pong-canvas, replay-modal, save-replay-btn, download-poster-btn, poster-canvas.
